params.name: History
params.description: Histories is a foundational work in Western historiography, meticulously documenting the entire process of the Greco-Persian Wars between the 5th and 4th centuries BC. The work is divided into nine volumes, each named after a Muse goddess from Greek mythology, with its own independent theme. Herodotus was the first to use the form of historical narrative, creating an unprecedented method of historical compilation that organically combines the recording of historical facts with in-depth interpret …
